ss in course cases
Afflicted : loss in court cases, accidents, dangers from voyages.
10th house -strong and well-aspected:Succes in business, profession, service,
government honour , good in fortune.
Afflicted : troubles in service, business, profession, disrepute and defamation.
11th house - strong and well-aspected: gains, large network and contacts.
Afflicted : unfavourable for livelihood, spoils 5th house, reduces marital
happiness.
12th house : afflicted – falls from grace, full of debts, banishment, confinement,
injury and impoverishment.
MERCURY
- A strong and well-aspected Mercury, when it is in the Ascendant, Xth, 9th, 3rd,
11th and 5th of the Praibhraman Chart, bestows favourable results in intellectual
vocations, At such time, if Mercury is the yoga karaka of wealth, then the
native will get favourable and profitable results in trade, writing, oratory,
eloquence, publications, travels, schools, universities, etc.
